title: Eshan's Missile Mod
description: Eshan's Missile Mod introduces modular missiles, warheads, radar, and a missile programmer to Minecraft.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da348f5e21d3f87567e70e447e2c871643d32225_0.webp)

**Introducing Eshan's Missile Mod!**
You build multi-block missiles from blocks, set a target, and launch them. 
Flight is physics-based: thrust, fuel, mass, drag, and gravity all matter. 
Higher tiers give you more range, better maneuvering, and bigger explosions.

Watch me launch a missile!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_DJ-D8eEMLE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Quick start
1. Stack thruster (bottom), 1–5 tanks, warhead or seeker head (top). Same facing on all parts.
2. Upgrade thruster/tank tiers with nozzles and fuel cores (right-click or apply using a dispense facing the block).
3. Place the missile programmer touching the missile stack and set X/Y/Z and frequency.
4. Place radar if you want threat tracking and set frequency for whitelisting missiles.
5. Redstone input at the thruster or press launch in the missile programmer.

## Features
- Modular missile stacks (1–5 tanks, mixed tank tiers ok)
- Tier upgrades: Copper / Iron / Steel / Netherite
- Warheads: HE tiers + incendiary, cluster, cluster incendiary, nuclear
- IR seeker head for homing missiles
- Missile programmer with target coords and frequency (friendly ID for radar)
- Radar: FE-powered scan, redstone/comparator output (redstone = range, comparator = # of missiles detected) with optional Create Display Link integration
- Physics flight: climb, guidance, terminal corrections
- VLS cell detection for sealed vertical launches
- Custom explosions, craters, shrapnel
- Positional audio (launch, motor, incoming warning, blast) for realism

![IR Missile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cebfd49a0034264b966a2bca273526a593d3b2f7_0.webp)


**Commands**

```
/emm give wand

/emm spawn <type> <x> <y> <z> [count] [spacing_ticks]

/emm missiles list
/emm missiles clear

/emm doRadarChunkRendering <true|false>
/emm radarChunkRadius <0-5>
/emm guidanceLogging <true|false>
```
